headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains In-Line on Public Storage, Lowers Price Target to $316
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Steve Sakwa   maintains Public Storage (NYSE:PSA) with a In-Line and lowers the price target from $318 to $316.
